subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Ancient of Days unto him who hath believed in God, the Peerless, the All-Knowing, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of God and be among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله القدیم لمن آمن بالله الفرد العلیم لیفرح بذکر الله و یکون من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
